problem_statement: The selected read-only worker path has runner-binding, runtime receipt candidate, schema-binding, and receipt-store write-path witnesses, but the next evidence boundary needs a schema-backed live runner registration witness that defines required registration evidence while keeping live runtime authority blocked.
success_criteria: ReadOnlyWorkerRuntimeRunnerRegistrationWitness validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example

the witness binds the receipt-store write-path witness, schema-binding witness, runtime receipt candidate, runner binding witness, emitter dry-run, handoff, binding, lease preflight, and rehearsal evidence
live runner registration witness is defined without performing runner registration

the future registration path requires operator approval, runner identity digest, capability scope, tenant and actor refs, temporal lease evidence, UAO, Phi_gov, WorkerFailureReceipt, receipt-store evidence, and effect reconciliation
focused tests reject authority drift, contract drift, missing refs, registration evaluation drift, admission drift, receipt-ref drift, count drift, and terminal-closure drift
non_goals: no launch, production, customer, or support readiness claim
constraints: live runner registration witness is witness-only

future dispatch admission must still require operator approval, runner identity digest, temporal lease evidence, UAO, Phi_gov, recovery evidence, live dispatch endpoint registration evidence, runtime emitter evidence, receipt-store evidence, and verification
WorkerFailureReceipt remains mandatory for failed or partial dispatch evidence
raw output retention remains denied and only output digests may be carried
Mfidel atomicity remains preserved and no text-processing decomposition is introduced
evidence_required: runtime runner registration witness validator receipt
focused pytest receipt for runner registration witness behavior
workspace governance preflight receipt before closure claim
